name: Almond Dumplings (for Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks in a bowl.
2. Add salt, pepper, chopped parsley, minced almonds, and baking powder to the beaten yolks. Gradually add enough flour until the mixture forms a very stiff batter.
3. Gently fold in beaten egg whites until just combined.
4. Test a teaspoonful of the batter in boiling water. If it disintegrates, add more flour.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the boiling soup about 10 minutes before serving.
This recipe is from The Settlement Cookbook.
